hooks.description: Detect React Native project and hint user about available commands
hooks.condition: file_exists:package.json AND (file_exists:metro.config.js OR file_exists:metro.config.ts OR file_exists:app.json OR file_exists:app.config.js OR file_exists:app.config.ts)
hooks.message:
React Native project detected. The rn-dev-agent plugin is active.

Available commands:
  /rn-dev-agent:test-feature <description> - Test a feature end-to-end
  /rn-dev-agent:debug-screen              - Diagnose and fix the current screen
  /rn-dev-agent:check-env                 - Verify environment is ready

Make sure Metro is running before testing.
